parsed.recommendation_text: Given the budget and quality sensitivity, the Sony WH-1000XM5 is a top choice but exceeds your budget. The Bose QC Ultra offers premium noise cancellation but at a higher price point. Sennheiser Momentum 4 provides audiophile sound but lacks LDAC support. Considering brand familiarity and value for money, the Sony Ultimate Ear Wireless headphones offer impressive battery life, good noise cancellation, and are within budget. They provide a mid-range experience with a balanced tuning and comfortable design.
